articles.title: A Possible Upside of a Bitter N.Y.C. Winter? There Might Be Fewer Rats.
articles.abstract: Rodent experts said the prolonged cold weather could kill some rats and cause others to have fewer babies, resulting in a smaller population in the spring.

multimedia.caption: Humans are not the only New York City residents who have avoided the outdoors during a recent cold snap. Complaints of rat sightings have continued to decline, city officials said.
multimedia.copyright: Todd Heisler/The New York Times

articles.title: Republicans Face Uphill Fight for N.Y. Governor: ‘We’re in Bad Shape’
articles.abstract: Bruce Blakeman, the Republican nominee against Gov. Kathy Hochul, has shown he can win in the suburbs. But political winds are blowing in his face.

multimedia.caption: Bruce Blakeman, the Nassau County executive, is a strong ally of President Trump, which is expected to cost him votes in New York.

articles.title: Racing Boats Over a Frozen Lake, a Rivalry From the 1800s Continues
articles.abstract: This year’s lengthy cold-snap formed thick enough ice on the Navesink River in New Jersey that two ice boat clubs were able to compete against each other in the Van Nostrand Challenge Cup. This was only the fourth time the race has been held in the competition’s nearly 140 year history.
articles.byline: By Mimi d’Autremont, Meg Felling and Corey Kilgannon

articles.title: Una hazaña olímpica: ver a una superestrella de k-pop en Milán
articles.abstract: En los Juegos Olímpicos de Invierno abundan los famosos. Para los fans de Sunghoon, del grupo coreano Enhypen, llegar a ver a su ídolo en Milán es toda una prueba de resistencia.

multimedia.caption: Desde la semana pasada, un flujo constante de fans se ha reunido en el exterior de un hotel de Milán para ver a Sunghoon, una estrella de k-pop que está de visita con motivo de los Juegos Olímpicos.
multimedia.copyright: Alessandro Grassani para The New York Times

articles.title: Bangladesh Holds Elections on Thursday. Here’s What to Know.

articles.title: Rusia podría tomar ciudades clave de Ucrania
articles.abstract: Las tropas rusas han avanzado a un ritmo glacial en los últimos meses, pero los avances en el sur y el este de Ucrania podrían dar a Moscú una ventaja en las conversaciones de paz mediadas por EE. UU.
org_facet: Center for Strategic and International Studies

multimedia.caption: Una familia se preparó para evacuar su hogar en Rivne, un pueblo cercano a Guliaipolé, en el sureste de Ucrania, en enero.

articles.title: Man Accused of Killing His Father Said He Was on a ‘Mission From God’

articles.title: Away From Pomp of Olympics, Homeless Shiver on Streets of Milan
